business.name: Beta Gym
business.tagline: Beta Gym is a CrossFit gym in New York offering group strength classes, personal training, nutrition coaching, and a supportive community for all fitness levels.

address.street: 495 Broadway b/t Broome St & Spring St

hero.headline: Your First Session Is on Us
hero.intro: Book a free 1-on-1 intro with a coach. We will assess your goals, walk you through the gym, and build a plan that fits your life.

valueProps.headline: Reach new heights
valueProps.body: Push yourself to improve with expert coaching and a community that keeps you accountable.

valueProps.headline: Easy workout scheduling
valueProps.body: We make it easy for anyone with a hectic life to find time to workout.

valueProps.headline: Guidance tailored toward your fitness goals
valueProps.body: Whatever your wellness goals are, we'll help you figure out the right fitness plan and stick to it.

home.communityHeadline: A community that will keep you going

communityProps.headline: Supportive community
communityProps.body: Train with people who cheer for you.

howItWorks.headline: Book your free intro
howItWorks.body: Pick a time that works for you and book your free 1-on-1 session with a coach.

howItWorks.headline: Meet your coach
howItWorks.body: Get a gym tour, complete a fitness assessment, and build a personalized plan.

howItWorks.headline: Start training
howItWorks.body: Pick a membership option and start crushing your fitness goals.

testimonials.quote: The community here is unreal. I’ve made friends and hit goals I never thought possible.
testimonials.name: Jamie R.

testimonials.quote: Coaches actually care about your progress. Best gym in SoHo.
testimonials.name: Priya S.

testimonials.quote: I was nervous to start, but the fundamentals program made me feel confident.
testimonials.name: Alex M.

faq.question: What happens during the free intro?
faq.answer: You’ll meet a coach, tour the gym, discuss your goals, and leave with a personalized plan.

faq.question: How long does it take to see results?
faq.answer: Most members notice improvements in energy and strength within the first 30 days.

faq.question: Do I get the chance to meet new friends?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Group classes and community events make it easy to connect.

faq.question: What sets you apart from other gyms?
faq.answer: Coach-led classes, personalized guidance, and a supportive community focused on long-term results.

faq.question: How often do you recommend coming to workout classes?
faq.answer: We recommend 3–5 sessions per week depending on your goals and schedule.

faq.question: Do you provide free refreshments there?
faq.answer: We have a purified water dispenser and encourage members to bring reusable bottles.

faq.question: Do I have to be fit to join?
faq.answer: No. All workouts are scalable and beginner-friendly.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards and ACH for memberships.

faq.question: What kind of exercises can I expect during a workout?
faq.answer: A mix of strength, conditioning, and functional movements, scaled to your level.

faq.question: Do I have to stop eating my favorite foods to be healthy?
faq.answer: No. Our nutrition coaching focuses on sustainable habits, not restriction.

programs.name: Fundamentals
programs.shortDescription: Learn the safety and technique basics, then graduate into regular classes with confidence.

whatIsIt.headline: What is Fundamentals?
whatIsIt.body: A beginner-focused program that teaches safe movement patterns and gym etiquette so you can join group classes with confidence.

whoIsItFor: Anyone who wants a confident start

whatIsIt.headline: Why nutrition coaching works
whatIsIt.body: One-on-one guidance that fits your lifestyle, helps you build sustainable habits, and supports your training goals.

hero.headline: About us
hero.subheading: A community-driven gym in the heart of New York.

about.gymStory: Beta Gym is a CrossFit gym in New York helping busy adults build strength, improve conditioning, and stay consistent. Members travel from SoHo, NoHo, Tribeca, and the surrounding neighborhoods.

hero.subheading: Flexible plans that fit your goals.
